cards.front: What is the purpose of creating a user in a database management system?
cards.back: To assign permissions and access levels to the user

cards.front: What is the SQL command used to create a new user in MySQL?
What is the SQL command used to grant all permissions to a user?
Who has the authority to create a new user and grant permissions?
What is the result of granting all permissions to a user in MySQL?
cards.back: The user will have full access to the database, including read, write, and execute privileges
